chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْأَرْضَ كُلَّهَا لِلْإِمَامِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 105 – The earth, all of it, is for the Imam<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف موقوف أو مضمر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/347)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف موقوف أو مضمر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/347)
text: أَخْبَرَنِي أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَمَّنْ رَوَاهُ قَالَ الدُّنْيَا وَ مَا فِيهَا لِلَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ لِرَسُولِهِ وَ لَنَا فَمَنْ غَلَبَ عَلَى شَيْ‏ءٍ مِنْهَا فَلْيَتَّقِ اللَّهَ وَ لْيُؤَدِّ حَقَّ اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى وَ لْيَبَرَّ إِخْوَانَهُ فَإِنْ لَمْ يَفْعَلْ ذَلِكَ فَاللَّهُ وَ رَسُولُهُ وَ نَحْنُ بُرَآءُ مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad who said, ‘Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abdullah informed be, from the one who reported it saying,

‘The world and whatever is in it is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High, and for His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup> and for us<sup>asws</sup>. So the one who overcomes upon anything from it, so let him fear Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and let him pay the Right of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High, and let him be righteous with his brethren. So if he does not do that, then Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup> and we<sup>asws</sup> are disavowed from him’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah from his narrator (one of the Imams (a.s.)) reported to me the following. “The world and all that is therein belong to Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, His Messenger and to us. If one would control a part of it he must maintain piety before Allah. He must pay the share of Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, be generous to his brethren, otherwise, Allah, the Messenger of Allah and we will bear no responsibility torwards him.”
